mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, e.member_id, e.semester_date, e.tuition, e.meal_fee, e.accommodation_fee, e.remark, e.create_time, e.update_time, e.create_by, e.update_by, e.del_flag FROM bus_education e LEFT JOIN bus_family_member m ON e.member_id = m.user_id
e.del_flag = 0 AND m.family_id = #{familyId} AND e.member_id = #{memberId} AND e.semester_date >= #{semesterDateStart}::date AND e.semester_date <= #{semesterDateEnd}::date
ORDER BY e.semester_date DESC
